channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Recycling bin needs emptying, 24th April
item.description:
The electrical recycling bin needs emptying.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Rubbish outside staplehurst house sholden gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Fridge left outside, 24th April
item.description:
Fridge left outside occupants from HMO house 25 for Months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Drawell Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left next to bins at 4 Drawell Close, 24th April
item.description:
The rubbish has been here for weeks as the occupants dumped rubbish here and bin collections don't remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Drawell Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this pothole be inspected on the hill close to the crossing, 24th April
item.description:
Can this pothole be inspected alongside other issues on Elmstead Lane nearby? It is a busy road and a bus route for the 314.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please inspect this pothole by crossing, 24th April
item.description:
Please inspect this pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This same rubbish was on the pavement 4 weeks ago, 24th April
item.description:
Thornsett Place still has not had a road sweeper for 20 years and this disgusting litter dropped by the refuse collectors was in the street before I went on holiday on 31st March and still there when I returned 23rd April. Whdn will we get a regular service here???

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornsett Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on the pavement., 24th April
item.description:
There is dog fouling on the pavement outside JD Sports. The whole high street needs to be thoroughly cleaned and disinfected.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powis Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 24th April
item.description:
There is a large amount of dog fouling on the pavement outside Deichmann.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powis Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping nexted to 135 and 135 whinchat road, 24th April
item.description:
There is people fly tipping in the ally way of 135 and 134 whinchat Road this is a on going issue that's been reported several times now it's being chucked over the garden of 135 and being placed on the drive way 135
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wigeon Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Kenilworth Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Abandoned car, 23rd April
item.description:
Car has been there for a few weeks and has been broken into many times. I am worried it will attract other cars to be broken into. The vehicle has been left down the alleyway off of batchwood green.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd April
item.description:
Been there for a week now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Provost Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shabby neglected railway arch attracting graffiti, 23rd April
item.description:
This Railway Arch badly needs to be repainted, it is insightly with peeling paint and dirty walls. Now it is attracting graffiti - it is located in a residential area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish fly ripped here, 23rd April
item.description:
Also on opposite side of road on electrical box next to the doorway to 39b/c someone has dumped beer cans and take away wrappers
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large household items dumped, 23rd April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Grafitti, 23rd April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London

item.title: St Mary cray high street opposite threshers day nursery, 23rd April
item.description:
Abandoned old caravan, causing obstruction on road and bus route

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Large area of Graffiti on Residential facing busy road, 23rd April
item.description:
This graffiti has been present for about a year. It has been reported to Southwark Council for removal but no action.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-30, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste collection missed again, 23rd April
item.description:
The waste has not been collected again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
